svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(30, 58, 95), rgb(169, 193, 225));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 148px; height: 1px; padding-top: 145px; margin-left: 305px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #0f172a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0f172a, #d3daea); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
